results.title: Ladders, saree pulleys: Neighbours turn rescuers after fire at building in Delhi's Tughlakabad
results.description: Residents of the neighbourhood said that within minutes of the fire breaking out, at around 2.15am, the entire lane was filled with smoke.

results.title: Assam CM Calls for ‘Geographic Equity’ in NITI Aayog’s Northeast Investment Strategy
results.description: Assam CM Himanta Biswa Sarma urges NITI Aayog to ensure geographic equity, positioning the Northeast as a key driver of Vikshit Bharat 2047.

results.title: NDA govt’s 12-year stint worked for women-led devpt: PM Modi
results.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi celebrates "12 Years of Nari Shakti," highlighting the NDA government's success in fostering women-led development across sectors like science, finance, and governance. Discover how policies in dignity and empowerment are shaping India's future.
